description:
Function introduction

 

1. 2.4G aerial stereo mouse
2.2.4G wireless Russian keyboard
3. Six-axis inertial sensing technology supports somatosensory games
4. Infrared remote control + infrared learning
5. Standard keyboard
6. Cursor one-key lock
7. Free switching between infrared and 2.4G
8. Support Android, Windows, Mac OS, Lilux and other operating systems
9. Control distance is more than 10M

Features

1. Built-in 6-axis inertial sensor, 360 ° free space motion recognition and sensing, precise and flexible control;
2. 2.4G wireless radio frequency technology, high bandwidth and high stability;
3. 1: 1 somatosensory manipulation and motion recognition, extraordinary user experience;
4. 2.4G wireless keyboard input function;
5. Infrared remote control and full keyboard learning function;
6. Search input, more convenient operation;
7. Accurately sense gestures, and adapt to support a variety of fast application function control and somatosensory games; support all 2D mouse control, and support mouse gesture-based shortcut control (requires APK application support)
 

  Packaging specifications:

   -1 x mx3 standard flying squirrel

   -1 USB wireless receiver

   -1 x user manual
